data.name: Synthetic Dreams 18+
data.detailed_description:
🖤 Synthetic Dreams 18+

Welcome to a world where desire is written in code.

“Synthetic Dreams 18+” is an immersive erotic VR experience set in the neon depths of NeuroCity — a futuristic landscape built by ARTICA ROBOTICS, where physical pleasure has been replaced by synthetic memory.

The system allows you to access and relive someone else's most intimate sexual fantasies — intense, isolated, and encoded within a cyberpunk future. All you need is the helmet. And the willingness to go inside.

🧠 Story

You begin in the ARTICA ROBOTICS central facility, where your identity is verified.
Once cleared, you step into NeuroCity — a world of glowing lights and hidden data.
Scattered across the city are six active locations, each marked by a glowing cyber-blue signal.
Each one holds a memory... waiting to be experienced.

💠 Gameplay

  • Explore six highly stylized locations, each with a unique character and fantasy

  • Put on the dream helmet and enter full erotic scenes

  • Grab and move the woman’s arms, legs, and hips during the act

  • Use a realistic dildo to penetrate the mouth or vagina

  • Observe the scene from any angle — freely move around in VR

  • Watch the woman react to your actions: facial expressions and sounds change dynamically based on penetration

  • Each character features 8 static sex positions you can switch between

  • Warning: realistic ejaculation is included — semen visibly soils the woman’s body and remains present throughout the scene

🔮 Fantasies you will experience

  • The Addicted Nurse — floating midair, lost in synthetic stimulants and suspended between awareness and bliss

  • The Tattooed Inmate — locked away, aggressive, and very aware that you're the only one watching

  • The Hacker Girl — hiding in a shadowy cyber-apartment, too smart to trust you, but too curious to ignore you

  • The Cyber Dancer — endlessly looping, cold and flawless, moving in sync with your gaze

  • The Android Club — a pleasure zone built by machines, for machines — eroticism without emotion, only perfectly executed protocol

  • The Overwritten Android — the most beautiful woman ever designed, so flawless... she barely feels real

data.short_description: Synthetic Dreams 18+ is an immersive erotic VR experience set in the neon depths of NeuroCity — a futuristic landscape built by ARTICA ROBOTICS, where physical pleasure has been replaced by synthetic memory.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 荷蘭文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文, 匈牙利文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-6600 (or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce RTX 2060 (or equivalent)
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
